rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF BURTON J. GOLDSTEIN
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Tax Costs
rulings.Rulings: Granted in part and Denied in part. Costs are taxed in the amount of $2,955.04 for the conceded items and the mediation costs, which the Court concludes each side should bear. The balance of costs in the amount of $1423.32 is allowed. Any party wishing to appear to contest this tentative ruling must advise opposing parties and notify the courtoom clerk (415-551-3702) by 4:30 p.m. on Wednesday, November 28, 2012.
